prompt:
A smartphone held above a desk displaying a stylized DSPACE wallet screen where a large dUSD coin icon and a bright "claim" checkmark icon indicate that today’s basic income payout is ready. On the desk below are a few physical dUSD-themed tokens or coins and a small plant, reinforcing the idea of digital currency with real-world impact. The UI uses color blocks and iconography instead of readable text.

Near-future solarpunk aesthetic with soft lighting, clean wooden surfaces, and perhaps a hint of solar panels or greenery outside a nearby window. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering with no brand logos and no legible words on the phone. The composition should clearly represent the excitement of claiming your first daily UBI payment.
